word: H6979 - קוּר - qûwr - koor - Break down

sections.paragraph:
Original: קוּר

Transliteration: qûr

Phonetic: koor

BDB Definition:

  1. (Qal) to bore, dig, dig for water
  2. to be cold
    1. (Hiphil) to make or keep cool
  3. (Pilpel) destroy, break down

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2004,2077

Part(s) of speech: Verb
